text: Whoever that person is that you're like, wow, I really love you, like I have so much love for you. Talk to yourself, that's the same way, do the exact same way. I think we're very hard on ourselves sometimes. I mean, I do it for the time. I'm like my worst critic, but it's important to just give yourself the love that you know you're
